title: fMBB Ceramic Soup Bowls, 4 Pack White Dinner Plates, Porcelain, Classic Style, 8.5 Inch Shallow Bowls - Ideal for Soup, Dessert, Salad and Pasta, Microwave and Dishwasher Safe
features: Soup Plates With Depth: 1 inches depth, wide rim design to serving 8.5 oz soup and just right capacity, the recessed middle area to keep the dishes from spilling out of the pasta plates. It could also cool the food quickly, and conveniently to scoop the last drop. It also provides a grip and gives you a place to hold when it's full of hot soup. It's easier to handle and hold and they stack really well without taking up much space

Durable & Healthy Porcelain: Made from porcelain fired at high temperatures, these white soup bowl plates do not absorb odors or flavors and resist moisture absorption. Lead free and chip resistant, making them healthy. The the 13 hours burn under 1300 °F generates its chip-resistant, and makes it more sturdy

Versatile Pasta Salad Bowls: 8.5", 8.5 oz, they hold a small portion amount of pasta, soup, salads, gumbo, stew, rice, etc. The classical design with a smooth finish ensures timeless beauty. Perfect soup plate set for a family party, Thanksgiving, or Christmas use

Minimalist White Plates: Classic white plates are the most popular basic dinnerware in the kitchen. The solid white color allows you to use these pasta bowls for fancy dinner for serving everyday stuff. Easy to showcase the food and there is no worry about staining

Microwave and Dishwasher Safe: High-quality durable porcelain, no cracks, chips, or flaws. You are able to warm food in the oven or microwave without worry about shattering. These dinner plates are very easy to clean because of the smooth surface. You can wash them with soap and hot water, or simply place them into your dishwasher.Also safe for dishwasher

A Wonderful Plate Idea: This Ceramic White Soup Plates will delight your family, lovers and guests on any seasons like family dinners, weddings, restaurant service, weeknight parties. Best plate for housewarming, Thanksgiving, Party, Christmas and fun celebrations
description: Welcome to the fMBB family, fMBB ceramic dinner plates debut. The minimalist round design and the classic white color make the dessert plates appeal to the eye. Each cutlery size providing ample space to hold your favorite meals. White dinnerware is perfect for everyday used, as well as more formal occasions. such as family dinners, dinner parties, or special events. They can be used for both formal and casual dining, making them a versatile addition to your tableware collection. Suitable for soup, salad, pasta, dessert, snack, cereal, ice cream. These dinner plates made of durable porcelain, can withstand the wear and tear of everyday use, Microwave, Dishwasher, Oven Safe. Our ceramic white dinnerware add elegance and warmth to every meal and make for a perfect gift for special occasions such as weddings, housewarmings, Christmas, and more. Give the gift of practical elegance and timeless beauty with our dinnerware.
